target_profile: Frontend engineer seeking English-friendly frontend roles in Japan
search_scope: Current Japan frontend openings verified on 2026-04-04
methodology: Reviewed live listing pages and normalized them into a shortlist.
assumptions: Keep internship roles only when they are clearly frontend-focused.
key_takeaways: TokyoDev currently provides the cleanest high-signal frontend listings in this sample.
Salary transparency is still uneven across otherwise strong openings.

jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
jobs.summary: Build the customer-facing product and lead frontend quality improvements.
jobs.notes: Strong stack match and clear role scope.
